invariants: POST /leftovers/{id}/eat and POST /leftovers/{id}/uneat remain idempotent and owner-scoped.
Planner column management remains the planner-column-customization contract: default 3 columns, user-managed 1-5, delete only empty columns.
System recipe books my_added/saved/liked cannot be renamed or deleted.
Account deletion remains soft-delete with confirmation; logout/delete-account APIs are unchanged.
backend.stage2_na_reason: UI-only slice. Existing 16-leftovers, 17a-mypage-overview-history, 17b-recipebook-detail-remove, 17c-settings-account, and planner-column-customization contracts already provide the needed APIs for MYPAGE, SETTINGS, LEFTOVERS, ATE_LIST, and RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL polish. New leftover meta fields, uneat policy removal, system recipebook rename/delete, or account policy changes must be split into contract-evolution.

vitest: MYPAGE 설정 진입 UI, saved section 흡수, account destructive action 미노출
SETTINGS logout/delete text trigger, category cleanup, planner column contract regression
LEFTOVERS CTA layout/copy, planner add payload, eat feedback
ATE_LIST repeated copy removal, uneat API preservation 또는 UI policy
RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL custom book menu/system book no-menu/recipe removal regression

design_authority.design_generator_skip_reason: This is a Wave1 port of already implemented screens using existing prototype/design authority artifacts. Stage 4 should compare current service screens against the Wave1 prototype and existing authority docs instead of creating a new visual direction.

blocked_conditions: Stage 4 requires undocumented LEFTOVERS meta such as meal column name or servings.
Stage 4 removes the uneat API or officially documented ATE_LIST recovery flow.
Stage 4 allows rename/delete for system recipe books.
Stage 4 changes logout/delete-account or planner column management policy.
